description_long: This is a rectangular, vertical filing cabinet with a simple, monolithic design and smooth, flat surfaces. The cabinet is a uniform light brown color, with no visible handles, label holders, or decorative features. The top and sides are flush, and the front face appears seamless, suggesting a minimalist or modern style. There are no visible seams or drawer outlines, which may indicate a single large compartment or a stylized representation. The cabinet is likely constructed from metal or wood, commonly used for durability in urban environments. Its sturdy build and flat top make it suitable for supporting additional objects or documents in an office or storage setting.
description: A plain, light brown, rectangular filing cabinet with smooth, featureless surfaces and a minimalist design. It appears sturdy and functional, suitable for office or storage use.
description_view_0: The front face of the cabinet is visible, showing a seamless, flat surface with no handles or drawer outlines.
description_view_1: The left side of the cabinet is shown, identical in color and texture to the front, with no visible features.
description_view_2: The back or opposite face is visible, mirroring the front with a smooth, uninterrupted surface.
description_view_3: The right side of the cabinet is shown, matching the left side in appearance and lacking any distinguishing features.
